trivia_bullets.text: Sultai Soothsayer is a Sultai-watermark uncommon from KTK (September 2014). The Sultai Brood are the set's decadent empire: naga leaders who maintain power through undead armies, political manipulation, and bargains with the rakshasa — demonic beings who share secrets with the Sultai naga in exchange for compensation.
sources: CBR.com: MTG Tarkir's Sultai Brood Clan, Explained

trivia_bullets.text: 3 printings: KTK (2014), The List, and Double Masters 2022. The Double Masters 2022 reprint (premium draft set) indicates continued Commander demand. Scryfall type line is 'Creature — Snake Shaman,' placing her with the Sultai naga using the 'Snake' creature subtype.

Flavor text: 'The naga of the Sultai Brood made deals with dark forces to keep their power.' A clan-level statement rather than a character attribution. The 'dark forces' are the rakshasa, left unnamed — fitting the Sultai culture of hidden allegiances.

A 2/5 for five mana that enters, digs four cards, puts one in hand, mills the other three. The milling is synergistic: KTK's Delve spells (Treasure Cruise, Dig Through Time, Murderous Cut) use graveyard cards as payment, and the Soothsayer feeds those costs while filtering. EDHREC rank 24,247.

related_cards.name: Tasigur, the Golden Fang
related_cards.note: Sultai Khan; his Delve mechanic uses graveyard cards the Soothsayer mills

related_cards.name: Sultai Charm
related_cards.note: Shares Sultai watermark; clan charm cycle anchor

related_cards.name: Murderous Cut
related_cards.note: Delve instant that benefits directly from graveyard fill the Soothsayer provides
